name: Golf Riversbend
address: 14077 St Francis Blvd NW, Ramsey, MN 55303
about: Riversbend Golf is a golf simulator venue offering a new and exciting experience for players of all skill levels. It features a Forsyth Sports Golf Simulator that allows guests to play over 100 golf courses from around the world. The venue provides a space for golf, games, food, and fun, suitable for both solo visits and group outings. Located in Ramsey, Minnesota, it has been operating for four years and aims to bring something new to its customers through its technology and amenities.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 100 golf courses worldwide
Forsyth Sports Simulator for high-quality simulation
Option for solo or group play

food_and_drink.notes: Food available, though details not specified
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Forsyth Sports Golf Simulator mentioned, but specific model not provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available at the venue, but details on outside food/drink are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but simulator sessions are typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as kid-friendly and suitable for families.
